name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne chain bag
A classic and elegant chain bag that enriches the 30 Montaigne collection. Crafted with blue jacquard fabric, highlighting the classic Oblique print. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details, such as the embossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlight the clean design. Small size, with a chain strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD clasp
Back embossed 30 Montaigne logo
Removable, adjustable leather chain strap
Internal patch pocket
Back pocket
Includes dust bag
Model: M9334
Dimensions: 21*12*6cm
